data.name: 夜色
data.detailed_description:
New game released


關於此遊戲

這是一款通過猜拳來解鎖女孩的休閒遊戲。如果您對我們的產品感興趣，請關注我們的組動態：
如對產品有疑問，可以加Q群：849227245瞭解詳情或者迴響問題。
如果您對覺得遊戲困難，可以通過“請她喝酒”抽取必勝卡，在猜拳中使用，快速通關。
DLC安装方法：使用win+r键打开运行窗口，输入steam://install/1521990

7個酒吧自由解鎖

您將通過猜拳或者是劃拳，來進入7間酒吧與角色對戰，贏了之後還有一個拼酒遊戲，只有在贏了拼酒遊戲以後才能獲得與女孩約會的權利。

15名性格迥異的角色

每個酒吧裡面都有一名性格不同的女孩，另外還有三使者與神域的繆斯女神，嘗試著去征服她們吧。

特色的拍照玩法

在解鎖女孩以後，可以在約會介面裏進行拍照，可以有不同的姿勢，配合自己上傳的背景，您可以創造出自己與虛擬角色的合影，記得用F12分享給大家哦

data.short_description: 這是一款通過猜拳來解鎖女孩的休閒遊戲
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512M
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Muse:Night Out
data.detailed_description:
New game released


About the Game

This is a game that unlocks girls by guessing numbers. If you are interested in our products, please pay attention to our group news:
If you feel the game is difficult, you can use items to make it easy.

7 bars to be unlock

You will enter 7 bars to go against the characters by playing guessing games. If you win, there will be a drinking war. Only after winning the drinking war can you get to date a girl.

15 characters with very different personalities

Each bar have their own pretty girls, try to conquer them all.

Photo booth

You can take photos in the date interface. Try shoot in different poses. create a photo of yourself with the virtual character. Remember to share it with everyone using F12.

data.short_description: This is a game that unlocks girls by play paper scissor rock like games.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 512M
  • Storage: 600 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
